ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the network */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., 4G, 5G, Wi-Fi) */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used (e.g., LTE, NR, IEEE 802.11) */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band used (e.g., 2.4 GHz, 5 GHz) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the network was installed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the network configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modulations" (
  "modulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modulation scheme */,
  "modulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the modulation scheme (e.g., BPSK, QPSK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modulation scheme */,
  "min_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Minimum bandwidth required for the modulation scheme */,
  "max_bandwidth" INTEGER /* Maximum bandwidth supported by the modulation scheme */,
  "efficiency" INTEGER /* Efficiency of the modulation scheme (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coding_rates" (
  "coding_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coding rate */,
  "coding_rate" REAL /* Coding rate value (e.g., 0.5, 1.0) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coding rate */,
  "min_modulation_id" INTEGER /* Minimum modulation scheme ID that supports this coding rate */,
  "max_modulation_id" INTEGER /* Maximum modulation scheme ID that supports this coding rate */,
  "redundancy" REAL /* Redundancy level of the coding rate (e.g., 0.1, 0.2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coding_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidths" (
  "bandwidth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth value (e.g., 20, 40, 80) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bandwidth */,
  "min_frequency" INTEGER /* Minimum frequency supported by this bandwidth */,
  "max_frequency" INTEGER /* Maximum frequency supported by this bandwidth */,
  "supported_modulations" TEXT /* List of modulation schemes supported by this bandwidth (e.g., 'BPSK, QPSK') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bandwidth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network using this configuration */,
  "modulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modulation scheme used in this configuration */,
  "coding_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coding rate used in this configuration */,
  "bandwidth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bandwidth used in this configuration */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_coding_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("coding_rate_id") REFERENCES coding_rates ("coding_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_modulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("modulation_id") REFERENCES modulations ("modulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_bandwidth_id FOREIGN KEY ("bandwidth_id") REFERENCES bandwidths ("bandwidth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration this metric belongs to */,
  "datarate" REAL /* Data transmission rate for this configuration */,
  "receiversensitivity" REAL /* Receiver sensitivity for this configuration */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were measured */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for this configuration */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency (in milliseconds) for this configuration */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter (in milliseconds) for this configuration */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength (in dBm) for this configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report was shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this comparison belongs to */,
  "configuration1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first configuration being compared */,
  "configuration2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second configuration being compared */,
  "comparison_result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., better, worse) */,
  "date_compared" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "comparator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparator_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_configuration2_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration2_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_configuration1_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration1_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)
